stemHtml: Where is the stopway located in relation to the runway?

options.a: At the start of the TORA, included in the ASDA and TODA.
options.b: At the end of the TORA, included in the ASDA.
options.c: At the end of the TODA, included in the ASDA.
options.d: At the start of the TORA, included in the TODA and LDA.
